reason_for_decision: The article now clears the pass threshold with stronger altitude-driven decision framing, clearer ambiguity reduction logic, and better selection guidance.
strengths: The article now explains why elevation information changes downstream cueing and track interpretation instead of only changing the display.
The distinction between informative altitude and operationally decisive altitude improves selection value.
It avoids overselling 3D radar by preserving cases where 2D remains rational.
summary_assessment: This version is publishable under the stricter rubric. It is more decision-oriented and materially more useful than a basic 2D-versus-3D definition piece.
